definition: you (informal, as opposed to courteous 您[nin2])
(third-person singular) (since the early 20th century, usu. male) he
a little (indicating brief duration, or softening the tone, or suggesting giving something a try)
(modal particle indicating change of state, situation now)
(of somebody or something) to be (located) at
to take the car, bus, train etc
to have a holiday or vacation
the Mid-Autumn Festival on 15th of 8th lunar month
reunion dinner on Lunar New Year's Eve (Chinese New Year tradition)
to play or strum a lute or other stringed instrument
